---
title: "Marianne Small"
---

## Marianne Small

**Dates:** (b. 1838/9)

### Description

pupil at Otterbourne school

### Biography

She was the daughter of John Small, agricultural labourer, and was born in Otterbourne.

### Letters

- Letter from October 29 [1849]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
